scripts.test: node --max-old-space-size=8192 --test tests/hash.js tests/api.test.js tests/ast.test.js tests/calculus.test.js tests/earley.test.js tests/earley-grammar.test.js tests/focused-prover.test.js tests/focusing.test.js tests/generic-prover.test.js tests/kernel-ops.test.js tests/kernel.test.js tests/manual-api.test.js tests/manual-proof-flow.test.js tests/manual-prover-logic.test.js tests/meta-ctx.test.js tests/multi-logic.test.js tests/proof-terms.test.js tests/prover.test.js tests/quantifiers.test.js tests/rule-interpreter.test.js tests/rules2-parser.test.js tests/sequent-ext.test.js tests/sequent.test.js tests/ui-flow.test.js tests/engine/arrlit.test.js tests/engine/backchain-agnostic.test.js tests/engine/clause-terms.test.js tests/engine/compiled-matcher.test.js tests/engine/compose.test.js tests/engine/constraint.test.js tests/engine/convert.test.js tests/engine/disc-tree.test.js tests/engine/e2e.test.js tests/engine/evidence.test.js tests/engine/explore.test.js tests/engine/fact-set.test.js tests/engine/forward.test.js tests/engine/memory.test.js tests/engine/named-args.test.js tests/engine/prediction.test.js tests/engine/preserved-sugar.test.js tests/engine/primitives.test.js tests/engine/sell.test.js tests/engine/separator.test.js tests/engine/sha3.test.js tests/engine/solc-benchmark.test.js tests/engine/store-binary.test.js tests/engine/bytecode-loader.test.js tests/engine/compose-inc-fusion.test.js tests/engine/compose-batch-resolve.test.js tests/engine/compose-chain-fusion.test.js tests/engine/sroa.test.js tests/engine/vmtest/vmtest.test.js
scripts.test:zk: node --max-old-space-size=8192 --test tests/zk-benchmark.test.js tests/zk-custom-chip.test.js tests/zk-uint256.test.js tests/zk-witness.test.js tests/zk-noffi-witness.test.js tests/chunked-witness.test.js tests/rewrite-trace.test.js tests/guided-term.test.js
scripts.test:heavy: node --max-old-space-size=8192 --test --test-concurrency=1 --timeout=1800000 tests/engine/rule-analysis.test.js tests/monad.test.js tests/engine/type-check.test.js tests/zk-symbolic-solc.test.js tests/zk-chunked-tree.test.js tests/zk-custom-chip-solc.test.js

scripts.build: npm run build:bundle && vite build --config src/ui/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:ui: npm run build:bundle && vite build --config src/ui/vite.config.ts
